Appearances:
Arnold Evje, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. represented by agent Sam Meki.
Shawn T. O'Leary, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendant: Robert A. Clark
This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
The Judge Pro Tem: Don Sullivan, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions in room 304-B.
The parties enter into a signed agreement "Judgment pursuant to stipulation", which was filed.
Case settled, TRIAL DATE vacated.
